summary: Frontend testing for PillarPageLayout unified design with dog soul colors. All 6 pillar pages (Emergency, Learn, Farewell, Adopt, Fit, Paperwork) render correctly with unified hero section, unique soul color gradients, consistent navigation header, and voice search button.
critical_code_review_comments: FarewellPage.jsx has an ESLint warning about missing 'fetchPets' dependency in useEffect (line 220) - not critical but should be fixed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified PillarPageLayout design refactoring complete. All 6 pillar pages tested and verified with correct soul colors and unified hero components.

emergency_page.content: 24/7 Emergency Hotline, Report Emergency button, What's Your Emergency section

learn_page.content: Training types (Basic Obedience, Puppy Training, Behavior Modification, etc.)

farewell_page.content: 24/7 Compassionate Support, Memorial and Support categories

adopt_page.content: Adoption stats (Pets Available, Happy Adoptions, Partner Shelters), Meet Pets and Foster buttons

paperwork_page.content: Secure Document Vault, Registration and Insurance categories

unified_components_verified.PillarPageLayout: ✅ Wraps all pillar pages with consistent structure
unified_components_verified.UnifiedHero: ✅ Renders with pillar-specific soul color gradients
unified_components_verified.Voice Search Button: ✅ Present in hero search bar on all pages
unified_components_verified.Products/Services Toggle: ✅ Navigation header with toggle on all pages
unified_components_verified.MiraChatWidget: ✅ Ask Mira floating button on all pages
unified_components_verified.AdminQuickEdit: ✅ Admin edit component loaded on all pages
